things.name: The Hermitage Museum
things.description: One of the world's greatest art museums in the Winter Palace with 3 million works across 1,000 rooms

things.name: Peterhof Palace & Grand Cascade
things.description: The 'Russian Versailles' with 150 fountains and golden statues in gardens on the Gulf of Finland

things.name: Church of the Saviour on Spilled Blood
things.description: Stunning 1883 Russian Revival church built on the spot where Tsar Alexander II was assassinated

things.name: White Nights
things.description: St Petersburg's magical midsummer phenomenon when the sun barely sets and bridges open at night

things.name: Peter and Paul Fortress
things.description: 1703 fortress housing the Cathedral where Russian tsars from Peter the Great are buried

things.name: Mariinsky Theatre
things.description: Russia's most celebrated opera and ballet theatre - home of Nureyev, Pavlova and Baryshnikov

things.name: Catherine Palace & Amber Room
things.description: Baroque palace at Tsarskoe Selo with the world-famous Amber Room and formal gardens

things.name: Nevsky Prospekt
things.description: St Petersburg's grand main avenue with the Kazan Cathedral, Grand Hotel Europe and Palkin restaurant

things.name: Russian Museum
things.description: World's largest collection of Russian art in the Mikhailovsky Palace

things.name: Vasilyevsky Island
things.description: Historic island district with the Rostral Columns, Exchange and the charming 18th Line cafes
